app.title: MBTI Love Compatibility Test | DopaBrain
app.description: MBTI love compatibility test for all 16 types. Find your perfect match and worst pairings!

header.title: 💕 MBTI Love Match
header.sub: Which MBTI type is your perfect match?

intro.title: MBTI Love Match
intro.sub: Which MBTI type is your perfect match?
intro.desc:
Answer 12 questions and discover
your love style + ideal compatibility match

questions.q1: On a first date with someone new, I...
questions.q1a: Start the conversation and lead the mood 😄
questions.q1b: Wait for them to talk to me first 😊
questions.q2: When planning a date with my partner...
questions.q2a: I decide spontaneously in the moment 🎲
questions.q2b: I plan and prepare in advance 📋
questions.q3: When my partner is having a hard time, I...
questions.q3b: Empathize and comfort their feelings first 💕
questions.q5: The most important thing in a relationship is...
questions.q5b: Happiness and joy in the present moment 🌈
questions.q6a: Try to talk it out right away 🗣️
questions.q7: How I express love to my partner...
questions.q9: My decision-making style in love is...
questions.q10: Activities I want to do with my partner...
questions.q11: My criteria for choosing a partner...

ENFP.title: Passionate Flame
ENFP.desc: When you fall in love, the whole world turns pink! You constantly gift your partner with new experiences and love spontaneous dates.
ENFP.idealType: Someone who enjoys deep conversations + adventure
ENFP.tip: In long-term relationships, you need to provide a sense of stability.

INFJ.title: Mystical Soul
INFJ.desc: Quiet on the outside but burning with passion inside. You seek spiritual connection and intuitively sense your partner's emotions.
INFJ.idealType: Someone who values honest conversations + respects values
INFJ.tip: Perfect love doesn't exist, but love that grows together does.

ENFJ.title: Warm Leader
ENFJ.desc: You sincerely wish for your partner's growth and happiness, always cheering them on. Your natural leadership guides the relationship.
ENFJ.idealType: Someone who appreciates sincerity + grows together
ENFJ.tip: Express your own feelings honestly too.

INFP.title: Dreamy Romantic
INFP.desc: You dream of fairy-tale love, and when you fall in love, you pour your whole heart into it. You shine brightest in genuine relationships.
INFP.idealType: Someone who understands sensitivity + dreams together
INFP.tip: Cherish the small happinesses in everyday life too.

ENTJ.title: Strong Strategist
ENTJ.desc: You have goals and plans even in love. You want to grow together while envisioning the future as a couple.
ENTJ.tip: Sometimes even inefficient romance is needed.

INTJ.title: Independent Strategist
INTJ.desc: Once you open your heart, you see them as a lifelong partner. You desire a mature relationship that respects each other's independence.
INTJ.tip: Expressing emotions more often will warm up the relationship.

ENTP.title: Creative Challenger
ENTP.desc: You treat love like an exciting game, enjoying intellectual exchange with your partner. You prefer new experiences.
ENTP.idealType: Someone with intellectual depth + sense of humor
ENTP.tip: Be careful not to hurt your partner's feelings.

INTP.title: Logical Thinker
INTP.desc: You analyze love logically and prove it through actions. You treasure a partner who shares intellectual curiosity.
INTP.idealType: Someone independent + who understands alone time
INTP.tip: One simple "I love you" can warm up the relationship.

ESFP.title: Free Entertainer
ESFP.desc: You make every moment with your partner feel like a celebration. You express affection through touch and have a natural talent for fun.
ESFP.idealType: Someone cheerful + who enjoys life together
ESFP.tip: Serious conversations and long-term plans are also necessary.

ISFP.title: Gentle Artist
ISFP.desc: You love through actions rather than words, feelings rather than logic. Small gifts and handwritten letters convey your heart.
ISFP.idealType: Someone who understands emotions + doesn't pressure
ISFP.tip: Express what's in your heart more often.

ESFJ.title: Warm Caregiver
ESFJ.desc: You cherish your partner like family, remember every anniversary, and value harmony with those around you.
ESFJ.idealType: Someone who appreciates sincerity + is family-oriented
ESFJ.tip: Don't try to be the perfect partner.

ISFJ.title: Devoted Guardian
ISFJ.desc: You quietly protect your partner and take care of even the smallest details with devoted love.
ISFJ.tip: Don't just sacrifice; express your own needs too.

ESTP.title: Bold Adventurer
ESTP.desc: You enjoy thrilling dates and stay true to the emotions of the moment.
ESTP.tip: Try making future plans together too.

ISTP.title: Free Craftsman
ISTP.desc: You prove love through practical help. You need alone time and dislike being tied down.
ISTP.tip: Try expressing emotions a bit more.

ESTJ.title: Responsible Leader
ESTJ.desc: You have rules and plans in love too. You treat your partner with responsibility and pursue stable love.

ISTJ.title: Trustworthy Protector
ISTJ.desc: You always keep promises and seek a lifelong partner. You cherish traditional dating.
ISTJ.idealType: Someone trustworthy + who shares traditional values
ISTJ.tip: Try expressing emotions a bit more.

compat.desc90: An ideal combination where you perfectly complement each other's weaknesses.
compat.desc80: A relationship that grows together through deep understanding and respect.
compat.desc65: Different charms can create an interesting relationship.
compat.desc50: Effort can build a good relationship, but mutual understanding is needed.
compat.desc30: You need to overcome differences in values and communication styles.
compat.desc0: Opposite personalities require a lot of effort and understanding.

result.label: Your Love Style
result.percentileStat: Only {percent}% of couples share this compatibility

tips: Let go of ideal type fixation

share.title: Share Your Love Style!
share.subtitle: Share with friends and compare your compatibility 💕
share.inviteText: My MBTI love style is {type}! {emoji} We're {score}% compatible. Check yours too! 👇
